scenes.description: A serene Korean traditional garden with cherry blossoms in full bloom, gentle breeze moving the petals
A bustling Seoul street market at night, neon signs glowing, people walking with umbrellas in light rain
A peaceful mountain temple at sunrise, mist rising from the valley, traditional architecture
A modern Korean cafe interior, latte art being created, cozy atmosphere with books and plants
A traditional Korean hanbok dancer performing in a palace courtyard, flowing movements
